text: Big one for the company: Northwind Logistics confirmed the PickPoint One pilot at their Reno fulfillment center, starting the first week of June. Four arms in the small-parts zone.
Excellent. Who runs it on their side?
Dana Whitfield, their operations manager. Two commitments from us: FleetView dashboards for her shift leads from day one, and an engineer on site for commissioning week.
FleetView provisioning for Northwind is straightforward — I'll have accounts ready two weeks before go-live.
Separate note: Cascadia Freight renewed FleetView for all their distribution sites. Quiet win for the subscription business.
